title: File Viewing
description: Perintah untuk melihat dan membaca konten file di macOS.

commands.name: cat
commands.title: Concatenate
commands.examples:
cat file.txt
cat -n script.sh
cat file1.txt file2.txt > gabungan.txt
commands.notes: Untuk file besar, gunakan `less` agar bisa di-scroll.

commands.name: less
commands.title: Less Pager
commands.examples:
less /var/log/system.log
less -N config.yml
cat largefile.txt | less
commands.notes: Navigasi: Space (halaman bawah), b (halaman atas), / (cari), n (hasil berikutnya).

commands.name: head
commands.title: Head
commands.examples:
head file.txt
head -n 20 log.txt
head -c 100 data.bin

commands.name: tail
commands.title: Tail
commands.notes: tail -f sangat berguna untuk monitoring log secara real-time.

commands.name: wc
commands.title: Word Count
commands.description: Menghitung jumlah baris, kata, dan byte.
commands.examples:
wc file.txt
wc -l *.swift
cat README.md | wc -w

commands.name: file
commands.title: File Type
commands.notes: Berguna untuk mengecek tipe file tanpa extension.

commands.name: mdls
commands.title: Metadata List (macOS)
commands.examples:
mdls photo.jpg
mdls -name kMDItemContentType file.pdf
mdls -name kMDItemPixelHeight image.png
commands.notes: Khusus macOS. Menampilkan metadata yang diindeks oleh Spotlight.
